name: Amplitude Analytics
description: Product analytics platform for tracking user behavior, funnel analysis, and retention cohorts across all growth initiatives.

name: Multi-Armed Bandit Testing
description: Dynamic A/B testing that automatically allocates more traffic to winning variants, reducing time-to-convergence.

name: GrowthBook
description: Open-source feature flagging and A/B testing platform with statistical engine for experiment analysis.

name: Customer Data Platform (CDP)
description: Unified customer data platform aggregating events from multiple sources into a single profile for segmentation and personalization.

name: ML-Driven Churn Prediction
description: Machine learning models that predict user churn based on behavioral patterns, enabling proactive retention campaigns.

name: Heap
description: Auto-captured analytics — tracks every user interaction without manual event instrumentation, then lets you retroactively define events.

name: VWO (Visual Website Optimizer)
description: VWO has been deprecated in favor of GrowthBook for A/B testing and Amplitude for analytics. No longer recommended for new experiments.

name: Referral Program Automation
description: Automated referral tracking, reward distribution, and viral loop analysis to optimize our referral engine.

name: dbt (Data Build Tool)
description: SQL-first transformation tool for analytics engineering, enabling version-controlled, tested data models in our warehouse.

name: Personalization Engine
description: Real-time content and product personalization based on user segment, behavior, and lifecycle stage.

name: Segment
description: Evaluating whether to consolidate Segment into our custom CDP to reduce costs and increase data control.

name: Next.js for Growth Landing Pages
description: React framework used for high-performance, SEO-optimized landing pages with ISR and edge rendering.
